api.account.errors.invalid_email.text: Is that a valid email address?
api.account.errors.invalid_email.context: Returned during signup when the email is malformed OR when the email's domain is not on the per-domain/global signup allowlist. The two call sites deliberately share this key — identical user-visible text prevents enumeration of which domains are allowed.

api.account.errors.password_too_short.context: Returned during signup when the supplied password is below the minimum length.
